---

config:
    theme: 'base'
    themeVariables:
        primaryColor: '#1f2020'
        primaryTextColor: '#f0f0f0'
        background: '#333'
        primaryBorderColor: '#888888'
        lineColor: '#999'

---

stateDiagram

%% Initial state name as "." so that it fits in black circle shape.
%% See https://github.com/StateSmith/StateSmith/issues/404
state "." as ROOT.(InitialState)

System_Initialization

System_Initialization : System_Initialization

System_Initialization : enter / { system_init_enter(); }

Adc_Calibration

Adc_Calibration : Adc_Calibration

Adc_Calibration : enter / { adc_calibration_enter(); }

Adc_Calibration : do / { adc_calibration_do(); }

state "System_Run" as System_Run {

        %% Initial state name as "." so that it fits in black circle shape.
        %% See https://github.com/StateSmith/StateSmith/issues/404
        state "." as System_Run.(InitialState)

        Standby

        Standby : Standby

        Standby : enter / { system_pause_enter(); }

        Standby : exit / { system_pause_exit(); }

        state "Electricity_Control_Mode" as Electricity_Control_Mode {

                %% Initial state name as "." so that it fits in black circle shape.
                %% See https://github.com/StateSmith/StateSmith/issues/404
                state "." as Electricity_Control_Mode.(InitialState)

                Initialization_Of_Pid

                Initialization_Of_Pid : Initialization_Of_Pid

                Initialization_Of_Pid : enter / { pid_init_enter(); }

                Electricity_Control

                Electricity_Control : Electricity_Control

                Electricity_Control : enter / { current_control_enter(); }

                Electricity_Control : do / { current_control_do(); }

                Electricity_Control : exit / { current_control_exit(); }

                Parameter_Adjustments

                Parameter_Adjustments : Parameter_Adjustments

                Parameter_Adjustments : enter / { parameter_adjust_enter(); }

                Change_Of_Objective

                Change_Of_Objective : Change_Of_Objective

                Change_Of_Objective : enter / { target_change_enter(); }

        }

        state "Electricity_Control_Mode2" as Electricity_Control_Mode2 {

                %% Initial state name as "." so that it fits in black circle shape.
                %% See https://github.com/StateSmith/StateSmith/issues/404
                state "." as Electricity_Control_Mode2.(InitialState)

                Initialization_Of_Pid2

                Initialization_Of_Pid2 : Initialization_Of_Pid2

                Initialization_Of_Pid2 : enter / { pid_init_enter(); }

                Electricity_Control2

                Electricity_Control2 : Electricity_Control2

                Electricity_Control2 : enter / { current_control_enter(); }

                Electricity_Control2 : do / { current_control_do(); }

                Electricity_Control2 : exit / { current_control_exit(); }

        }

        state System_Run.(ChoicePoint)(Electricity_Control_Mode__Mermaid_StateSmith_Issue_512__0) <>

        state System_Run.(ChoicePoint)(Electricity_Control_Mode__Mermaid_StateSmith_Issue_512__1) <>

        state System_Run.(ChoicePoint)(Electricity_Control_Mode2__Mermaid_StateSmith_Issue_512__0) <>

        state System_Run.(ChoicePoint)(Electricity_Control_Mode2__Mermaid_StateSmith_Issue_512__1) <>

}

System_Error

System_Error : System_Error

System_Error : enter / { system_error_enter(); }

System_Error : exit / { system_error_exit(); }

System_Stop

System_Stop : System_Stop

System_Stop : enter / { system_stop_enter(); }

System_Stop : do / { system_stop_do(); }

ROOT.(InitialState) --> System_Initialization

System_Initialization --> Adc_Calibration : do

Adc_Calibration --> System_Run : adc_calibration_complete

Adc_Calibration --> System_Error : calibration_failed

System_Run --> System_Error : control_anomaly

System_Run --> System_Stop : stop_the_request

System_Run --> System_Run : ISSUE_512

System_Run --> System_Run : ISSUE_512_ALT [test]

System_Run.(InitialState) --> Standby

Standby --> Electricity_Control_Mode : power_control

Electricity_Control_Mode --> Standby : get_on_standby

Electricity_Control_Mode --> System_Run.(ChoicePoint)(Electricity_Control_Mode__Mermaid_StateSmith_Issue_512__0) : ISSUE_512

Electricity_Control_Mode --> System_Run.(ChoicePoint)(Electricity_Control_Mode__Mermaid_StateSmith_Issue_512__1) : ISSUE_512_ALT

Electricity_Control_Mode --> Electricity_Control_Mode2 : switch_mode

Electricity_Control_Mode.(InitialState) --> Initialization_Of_Pid

Initialization_Of_Pid --> Electricity_Control : do

Electricity_Control --> Parameter_Adjustments : needed_referral

Electricity_Control --> Change_Of_Objective : target_current_change

Parameter_Adjustments --> Electricity_Control : do

Change_Of_Objective --> Electricity_Control : do

Electricity_Control_Mode2 --> System_Run.(ChoicePoint)(Electricity_Control_Mode2__Mermaid_StateSmith_Issue_512__0) : ISSUE_512 [test_1]

Electricity_Control_Mode2 --> System_Run.(ChoicePoint)(Electricity_Control_Mode2__Mermaid_StateSmith_Issue_512__1) : ISSUE_512 [test_2] / { do_something(); }

Electricity_Control_Mode2 --> Electricity_Control_Mode : switch_mode

Electricity_Control_Mode2.(InitialState) --> Initialization_Of_Pid2

System_Run.(ChoicePoint)(Electricity_Control_Mode__Mermaid_StateSmith_Issue_512__0) --> Electricity_Control_Mode

System_Run.(ChoicePoint)(Electricity_Control_Mode__Mermaid_StateSmith_Issue_512__1) --> Electricity_Control_Mode

System_Run.(ChoicePoint)(Electricity_Control_Mode2__Mermaid_StateSmith_Issue_512__0) --> Electricity_Control_Mode2

System_Run.(ChoicePoint)(Electricity_Control_Mode2__Mermaid_StateSmith_Issue_512__1) --> Electricity_Control_Mode2
StateSmith Simulator
settings delete help
